replies.author: @adrian_veidt
replies.text:
​​@therookie5714 The thing that most critics failed to see is that Batman is not based on post crisis version.

He's more based on Earth 51 batman from Countdown to Final crisis. Not the frank miller's dark knight returns. Earth 51 Bruce murdered Joker and the villains after Jason was killed.

Even without knowing that, You're supposed to not like his actions in the film. It was Superman who reasoned with Bruce not to murder Joker after the latter beat Jason to death in the comic. Batfleck didn't have that leisure.

He was an old and jaded man by the time of BVS. He was suffering from trauma the night his powers were gunned down. The zero incident reawakened that trauma. His character arc was him regaining his humanity and becoming more like his post crisis version.

author: @Marc_Andre_Roy
text: Eh, while i will say Gunn’s way too attached to this project, i also don’t think the trailer was bad. I didn’t like seeing Superman get so easily emotional and frazzled but he’s also naive by nature and he’s good and pure of heart. He doesn’t understand why this would be seen as a problem. I also can’t blame him for getting emotional about saving people. That’s who he is. I also don’t think just slapping the original John Williams score over a recut version of the trailer just all the sudden makes it 10x better. That’s not to say i don’t love the John Williams theme because Reeve is my favorite Superman of all time and that theme is probably the greatest theme I’ve ever heard. I think the reimagined theme with touches of the original is good. It will feel undeserved and unearned if the movie isn’t good though. My biggest qualm is the suit. The colors and over all style is good. It’s reminiscent of a classic Reeve style suit, but i would rather gotten an actual classic Reeve style suit with the classic S, no lines, no collar, no MCU lines, etc. The marketing has been weird. I mean this project has been all over the place lately which is good, it just feels off because there was virtually  nothing up til now. I’m excited for a new Superman i just wish he had a classic suit. That’s what’s waning my excitement. But I’m gonna still see it opening night.
